title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions:
Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
